004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.nio.charset.*;
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
029
030/**
031 * Mixin that serves a request-echo / round-trip introspection endpoint at {@code /echo/*}
032 * (configurable).
033 *
034 * <p>
035 * Sibling of {@link AdminMixin} ({@code /admin/*}) and {@link RouteIndexMixin}
036 * ({@code /options}, {@code /routes}). All three classes live in the
037 * {@code org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops} ops/introspection mixin pack.
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * Compose into a host resource via
041 * {@link Rest#mixins() @Rest(mixins=EchoMixin.class)}; the {@code /echo/*} URL becomes
042 * available alongside the host's own endpoints with no further wiring.
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>Configurable mount path:</h5>
045 *
046 * <p>
047 * The default mount {@code /echo/*} can be overridden via the SVL variable
048 * {@code ${juneau.echo.path:echo}} &mdash; set via system property
049 * ({@code -Djuneau.echo.path=introspect}), environment variable
050 * ({@code JUNEAU_ECHO_PATH=introspect}), or {@code Config} key
051 * ({@code juneau.echo.path = introspect}) to change the runtime mount without subclassing.
052 * Resolution happens once at {@link RestContext} construction time (SVL resolution in {@code @RestOp(path)}).
053 *
054 * <p>
055 * Override accepts bare token ({@code echo}), leading slash ({@code /echo}), trailing slash
056 * ({@code echo/}), or wildcard suffix ({@code /echo/*}) &mdash; all resolve to the same mount.
057 *
058 * <p>
059 * <b>Migration note (10.0.0):</b> Earlier development snapshots of this mixin mounted at both
060 * {@code /echo/*} <i>and</i> {@code /debug/echo/*} as historical aliases on a single op. That
061 * dual default has been collapsed to a single SVL-configurable mount as part of the
062 * "single path per op" principle. Deployers who relied on the
063 * {@code /debug/echo/*} alias must now either set {@code -Djuneau.echo.path=debug/echo} or
064 * compose a second instance with the override.
065 *
066 * <h5 class='section'>Mixin-only deployment:</h5>
067 *
068 * <p>
069 * This resource is designed for composition via {@code @Rest(mixins=...)}. The mount path is
070 * pinned at the op level by {@link RestOp @RestOp(path="/&#123;juneau.echo.path:echo&#125;/*")} on
071 * {@link #echo}; a class-level {@code @Rest(paths=...)} declaration would be silently ignored
072 * under the mixin pattern (see {@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} Javadoc).
073 *
074 * <h5 class='figure'>Composition example:</h5>
075 *
076 * <p class='bjava'>
077 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(
078 *       path=<js>"/api"</js>,
079 *       mixins=EchoMixin.<jk>class</jk>,
080 *       debug=<js>"conditional"</js>          <jc>// gates the echo endpoint per request</jc>
081 *    )
082 *    <jk>public class</jk> ApiResource <jk>extends</jk> RestServlet { }
083 *
084 *    <jc>// Optional: tighten the body cap or adjust redacted headers via a @Bean factory:</jc>
085 *    <ja>@Bean</ja> EchoMixin echo() {
086 *       <jk>return</jk> EchoMixin.<jsm>create</jsm>()
087 *          .bodyLimit(64 * 1024L)
088 *          .redactHeader(<js>"X-Internal-Trace"</js>)
089 *          .build();
090 *    }
091 * </p>
092 *
093 * <h5 class='section'>Debug gating:</h5>
094 *
095 * <p>
096 * The handler is gated behind the host's
097 * {@link RestContext#getDebugEnablement() DebugEnablement} chain &mdash; the same mechanism that
098 * powers {@code @Rest(debug=...)}. When {@code Debug} resolves to {@code OFF} for the current
099 * request, the handler returns {@code 404 Not Found} (so the existence of the endpoint isn't
100 * disclosed). When debug is {@code ALWAYS}, or {@code CONDITIONAL} with the {@code Debug: true}
101 * request header, the full echo payload is returned. The recommended posture for production
102 * deployments is {@code @Rest(debug="conditional")} paired with a guard chain so only authorized
103 * operators can flip the {@code Debug} header.
104 *
105 * <h5 class='section'>Sensitive-header redaction:</h5>
106 *
107 * <p>
108 * Token-bearing headers must never be reflected back to the caller (would defeat any auth scheme
109 * in front of the endpoint). The default redacted list is &mdash; case-insensitively &mdash;
110 * {@code Authorization}, {@code Cookie}, {@code Set-Cookie}, {@code Proxy-Authorization}, and
111 * {@code X-API-Key}. Each redacted header surfaces in the echo body with the literal value
112 * {@value #REDACTED} so the caller can see the header was present without leaking its value.
113 * Override the default list via {@link Builder#redactedHeaders(String...)} (replaces) or extend
114 * via {@link Builder#redactHeader(String)} (additive).
115 *
116 * <h5 class='section'>Body capture and truncation:</h5>
117 *
118 * <p>
119 * The handler reads up to {@link Builder#bodyLimit(long) bodyLimit} bytes (default
120 * {@value #DEFAULT_BODY_LIMIT_DOC} = 1 MB) of the inbound body and emits it as a UTF-8 string in
121 * the {@code content} field of the JSON response. When the body exceeds the cap, the captured
122 * portion is truncated and the {@code truncated} flag is set to {@code true} so callers can see
123 * the response is incomplete.
124 *
125 * <h5 class='section'>Response shape:</h5>
126 *
127 * <p class='bjson'>
128 *    {
129 *       <jok>"method"</jok>: <jov>"POST"</jov>,
130 *       <jok>"path"</jok>: <jov>"/echo/foo/bar"</jov>,
131 *       <jok>"queryString"</jok>: <jov>"x=1"</jov>,
132 *       <jok>"pathRemainder"</jok>: <jov>"foo/bar"</jov>,
133 *       <jok>"headers"</jok>: { <jok>"User-Agent"</jok>: <jov>"curl"</jov>, <jok>"Authorization"</jok>: <jov>"[REDACTED]"</jov> },
134 *       <jok>"queryParams"</jok>: { <jok>"x"</jok>: <jov>"1"</jov> },
135 *       <jok>"attributes"</jok>: { },
136 *       <jok>"contentLength"</jok>: <jov>5</jov>,
137 *       <jok>"content"</jok>: <jov>"hello"</jov>,
138 *       <jok>"truncated"</jok>: <jov>false</jov>
139 *    }
140 * </p>
141 *
142 * <p>
143 * The endpoint is excluded from generated Swagger / OpenAPI specs via
144 * {@link OpSwagger#ignore() @OpSwagger(ignore=true)}.
145 *
146 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
147 *    <li class='jc'>{@link AdminMixin}
148 *    <li class='jc'>{@link RouteIndexMixin}
149 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerCompositionMixinsAndPaths">REST Server &mdash; Composition (mixins, paths)</a>
150 * </ul>
151 *
152 * @since 10.0.0
153 */
154// @formatter:off
155@Rest
156public class EchoMixin {
157
158   /** Sentinel value emitted in place of redacted header values. */
159   public static final String REDACTED = "[REDACTED]";
160
161   /** Default body capture cap, in bytes (1&nbsp;MB). */
162   public static final long DEFAULT_BODY_LIMIT = 1_048_576L;
163
164   /** Default body capture cap rendered for the class-level javadoc &mdash; do not use programmatically. */
165   static final String DEFAULT_BODY_LIMIT_DOC = "1048576";
166
167   /** Default redacted-header set (case-insensitive lookup). */
168   public static final Set<String> DEFAULT_REDACTED_HEADERS = Set.of(
169      "Authorization", "Cookie", "Set-Cookie", "Proxy-Authorization", "X-API-Key");
170
171   /**
172    * Creates a new builder.
173    *
174    * @return A new builder.
175    */
176   public static Builder create() {
177      return new Builder();
178   }
179
180   private final long bodyLimit;
181   private final Set<String> redactedHeadersLower;
182
183   /** No-arg constructor &mdash; uses {@link #DEFAULT_BODY_LIMIT} and {@link #DEFAULT_REDACTED_HEADERS}. */
184   public EchoMixin() {
185      this(create());
186   }
187
188   /**
189    * Builder constructor.
190    *
191    * @param builder The builder.
192    */
193   protected EchoMixin(Builder builder) {
194      bodyLimit = builder.bodyLimit;
195      var s = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
196      for (var h : builder.redactedHeaders)
197         s.add(h.toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT));
198      redactedHeadersLower = Collections.unmodifiableSet(s);
199   }
200
201   /**
202    * [* /echo/*] &mdash; emit an introspection echo of the inbound request.
203    *
204    * <p>
205    * Returns {@code 404 Not Found} when {@code Debug} is not enabled for the current request.
206    *
207    * @param req The current REST request.
208    * @param res The current REST response.
209    * @param remainder The path remainder after the mount prefix (multi-segment, may be empty).
210    * @throws IOException If an I/O error occurs while reading the request or writing the response.
211    * @throws NotFound When {@code Debug} resolves to {@code OFF} for the current request.
212    */
213   @RestOp(
214      method="*",
215      path="/#{pathToken(${juneau.echo.path:echo})}/*",
216      summary="Request echo",
217      description="Round-trip introspection of the inbound request. Debug-gated.",
218      swagger=@OpSwagger(ignore=true)
219   )
220   public void echo(RestRequest req, RestResponse res, @Path("/*") String remainder) throws IOException {
221      var ctx = req.getContext();
222      var de = ctx.getDebugEnablement();
223      var sreq = req.getHttpServletRequest();
224      if (de == null || ! de.isDebug(ctx, sreq))
225         throw new NotFound("Echo endpoint disabled (Debug not enabled).");
226
227      var headers = new LinkedHashMap<String,String>();
228      var names = sreq.getHeaderNames();
229      while (names != null && names.hasMoreElements()) {
230         var name = names.nextElement();
231         var key = name.toLowerCase(Locale.ROOT);
232         headers.put(name, redactedHeadersLower.contains(key) ? REDACTED : sreq.getHeader(name));
233      }
234
235      var queryParams = new LinkedHashMap<String,String>();
236      for (var p : req.getQueryParams())
237         queryParams.put(p.getName(), p.asString().orElse(null));
238
239      var attributes = new LinkedHashMap<String,String>();
240      req.getAttributes().asMap().forEach((k, v) -> attributes.put(k, String.valueOf(v)));
241
242      var capture = readBoundedBody(sreq.getInputStream(), bodyLimit);
243
244      var out = new LinkedHashMap<String,Object>();
245      out.put("method", req.getMethod());
246      out.put("path", sreq.getRequestURI());
247      out.put("queryString", sreq.getQueryString());
248      out.put("pathRemainder", remainder == null ? "" : remainder);
249      out.put("headers", headers);
250      out.put("queryParams", queryParams);
251      out.put("attributes", attributes);
252      out.put("contentLength", capture.bytesRead);
253      if (capture.bytesRead > 0)
254         out.put("content", new String(capture.bytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
255      out.put("truncated", capture.truncated);
256
257      try (var w = res.getDirectWriter("application/json")) {
258         JsonSerializer.DEFAULT_READABLE.serialize(out, w);
259      }
260   }
261
262   /**
263    * Returns the configured body-capture cap (test/inspection helper).
264    *
265    * @return The body capture cap, in bytes.
266    */
267   public long getBodyLimit() {
268      return bodyLimit;
269   }
270
271   /**
272    * Returns the redacted-header set as lowercased, immutable strings (test/inspection helper).
273    *
274    * @return The redacted-header set.
275    */
276   public Set<String> getRedactedHeadersLower() {
277      return redactedHeadersLower;
278   }
279
280   @SuppressWarnings({
281      "java:S135" // The two breaks are distinct truncation exits (limit-reached vs. partial-final-chunk); merging them would obscure the bounded-read logic.
282   })
283   private static BodyCapture readBoundedBody(InputStream in, long limit) throws IOException {
284      if (in == null)
285         return new BodyCapture(new byte[0], 0, false);
286      var buf = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
287      var chunk = new byte[8192];
288      var truncated = false;
289      long total = 0;
290      int n;
291      while ((n = in.read(chunk)) != -1) {
292         var room = limit - total;
293         if (room <= 0) {
294            truncated = true;
295            break;
296         }
297         if (n > room) {
298            buf.write(chunk, 0, (int) room);
299            total += room;
300            truncated = true;
301            break;
302         }
303         buf.write(chunk, 0, n);
304         total += n;
305      }
306      return new BodyCapture(buf.toByteArray(), total, truncated);
307   }
308
309   private static final class BodyCapture {
310      final byte[] bytes;
311      final long bytesRead;
312      final boolean truncated;
313
314      BodyCapture(byte[] bytes, long bytesRead, boolean truncated) {
315         this.bytes = bytes;
316         this.bytesRead = bytesRead;
317         this.truncated = truncated;
318      }
319   }
320
321   /**
322    * Builder for {@link EchoMixin} instances.
323    */
324   public static class Builder {
325
326      private long bodyLimit = DEFAULT_BODY_LIMIT;
327      private final Set<String> redactedHeaders;
328
329      /** Constructor &mdash; package access for {@link EchoMixin#create()}. */
330      protected Builder() {
331         redactedHeaders = new LinkedHashSet<>(DEFAULT_REDACTED_HEADERS);
332      }
333
334      /**
335       * Sets the body capture cap.
336       *
337       * <p>
338       * Captured content is truncated when the inbound body exceeds this size; the
339       * {@code truncated} flag in the response is set to {@code true}.
340       *
341       * @param value Cap, in bytes. Must be {@code >= 0}.
342       * @return This object.
343       */
344      public Builder bodyLimit(long value) {
345         if (value < 0)
346            throw new IllegalArgumentException("bodyLimit must be >= 0");
347         bodyLimit = value;
348         return this;
349      }
350
351      /**
352       * Replaces the redacted-header set with the supplied values.
353       *
354       * <p>
355       * Header names are matched case-insensitively. Pass an empty array to disable redaction
356       * (not recommended outside of integration tests).
357       *
358       * @param values The header names to redact.
359       * @return This object.
360       */
361      public Builder redactedHeaders(String...values) {
362         redactedHeaders.clear();
363         if (values != null)
364            for (var v : values)
365               if (v != null && ! v.isBlank())
366                  redactedHeaders.add(v);
367         return this;
368      }
369
370      /**
371       * Adds an additional header name to the redacted-header set.
372       *
373       * @param value The header name to redact (case-insensitive). Must not be {@code null} or
374       *    blank.
375       * @return This object.
376       */
377      public Builder redactHeader(String value) {
378         if (isBlank(value))
379            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Argument 'value' must not be null or blank");
380         redactedHeaders.add(value);
381         return this;
382      }
383
384      /**
385       * Builds a {@link EchoMixin} instance.
386       *
387       * @return A configured instance.
388       */
389      public EchoMixin build() {
390         return new EchoMixin(this);
391      }
392   }
393}
